def positive_retry_loop_logs_without_attempt_count_or_backoff_context():
    rule_id = "retry_loop_logs_without_attempt_count_or_backoff_context"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag retry logging that omits attempt number, delay, or terminal outcome."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
